mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sales_comment (after_sales_id, after_sales_no, commenter_id, commenter_role, content, internal_only, created_at) VALUES (#{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{commenterId}, #{commenterRole}, #{content}, #{internalOnly}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, commenter_id, commenter_role, content, internal_only, created_at FROM after_sales_comment WHERE after_sales_id = #{afterSalesId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, commenter_id, commenter_role, content, internal_only, created_at FROM after_sales_comment WHERE after_sales_no = #{afterSalesNo} ORDER BY created_at ASC
